title: Wemmbu PVP Fan Pack
description: A fan‑made PvP resource pack inspired by Wemmbu that sharpens the classic PvP experience.
body:
✨ Resource Pack Description  
Step into a sharper, more atmospheric Wemmbu‑inspired PvP experience built for players who want clarity without losing style. This fan‑made pack keeps the original UI untouched while refining the world around you—cleaner visuals, smoother combat readability, and a distinct purple‑themed aesthetic that sets every fight apart.

Custom‑skinned totems bring a unique personality to clutch moments, paired with a small, minimal pop animation that keeps your focus on the duel. Low‑fire and a custom fire texture ensure your screen stays clear even in the most chaotic exchanges. Cobwebs and crystals have been reimagined with a deep purple glow, giving traps, caves, and crystal PvP arenas a mystical edge that ties perfectly into the pack’s identity.

Every detail works together to create a PvP environment that feels clean, enchanted, and unmistakably Wemmbu‑inspired—without ever touching your UI.

🔥 Features

Custom‑skinned totem with a unique Wemmbu‑style personality

Small, unobtrusive totem pop animation for better visibility

Low‑fire for maximum clarity in combat

Custom fire texture designed for competitive PvP

Purple‑themed cobwebs for cleaner trap visuals

Purple crystal textures for a mystical, cohesive aesthetic

No UI changes — keeps your menus and HUD exactly as you like them

Optimized visuals for smooth, distraction‑free PvP

📌 Supported Versions  
1.21.11
